tasks: Drop: Pick up 'Double Strike'
Chest: Pick up 'Chance to Bleed'
act1_the_twilight_strand.weapon_target: Corroded Blade / Stone Axe / Driftwood Maul (any 2H upgrade)

tasks: REWARD: Take 'Splitting Steel' from Tarkleigh
BUY: 'Spectral Throw' (Optional)
BUY: Corroded Blade 2H weapon (Optional, big damage upgrade)
LINK: Splitting Steel - Chance to Bleed
act1_lioneye_s_watch.weapon_target: Longsword / Tribal Maul / Jade Chopper (check vendor for 1 Transmute)
act1_lioneye_s_watch.tree_milestone: ACT 1 EARLY: Grab Art of the Gladiator, Bravery.

tasks: REWARD: Take 'Quicksilver Flask' from Nessa
BUY: 'Volley' or 'Momentum', 'Dash', 'Blood and Sand' (Do NOT Enable B&S yet)
LINK: Splitting Steel - Chance to Bleed - Volley or Momentum
CHECK: Vendor for Iron Rings & a Rustic Sash
CHECK: Vendor for a GR or GGR Linked Item (for Leap Slam later)

act1_prisoner_s_gate.tree_milestone: ACT 1 MID: Continue to Master of the Arena, then Destroyer.

tasks: REWARD: Take 'Added Fire Damage'
REWARD: Take 'Leap Slam'
BUY: 'Faster Attacks', 'Frostblink' (Remove Dash)
BUY: Lapis Amulet (not always in stock)
LINK: Leap Slam - Faster Attacks - Momentum
BUY: 'Ruthless', 'War Banner', 'Precision', 'Intimidating Cry'
LINKS: Splitting Steel - Chance to Bleed - Ruthless (or Momentum)
LINKS: Leap Slam - Faster Attacks - Momentum
AURAS: Blood and Sand, War Banner, Precision
act1_lioneye_s_watch_4.weapon_target: Mallet / Woodsplitter (2H Mace or Axe — Sunder cannot use Swords!)

act1_the_ship_graveyard_3.tree_milestone: ACT 1 LATE: Finish Destroyer cluster. (Mana flows if you need mana).

tasks: This completes 'The Siren's Cadence' and unlocks Sunder!
SUNDER PIVOT: Buy 'Sunder' from Nessa (now unlocked after Merveil!)
OPTIONAL: Buy a Heavy Belt if you need STR for Axes
WEAPON: Switch to a 2H Mace or 2H Axe (Sunder cannot use Swords!)
act2_the_forest_encampment.weapon_target: Poleaxe (2H Axe). Use Vendor Recipe: Weapon + Rustic Sash + Whetstone = %IPD
act2_the_forest_encampment.tree_milestone: ACT 2: Path toward Marauder/Scion. Grab Golem's Blood and Champion of the Cause.

tasks: BUY: 'Sunder' from Nessa
LINKS: Sunder - Chance to Bleed - Ruthless (or Momentum)
act2_lioneye_s_watch.weapon_target: Mallet / Woodsplitter (2H Mace or Axe — Sunder cannot use Swords!)

act2_the_forest_encampment_2.weapon_target: Poleaxe (2H Axe). Use Vendor Recipe: Weapon + Rustic Sash + Whetstone = %IPD

tasks: REWARD: Add 'Herald of Ash'
BUY: 'Blood Rage' & 'Poacher's Mark' (Optional)
Bandits: HELP ALIRA (15% All Res & Mana Regen)
REWARD: Take 'Melee Phys' OR 'Close Combat' (Buy the other!)
LINK: Sunder - Melee Phys - Close Combat (Use Ruthless if 3 Red)

act2_lioneye_s_watch_2.tree_milestone: ACT 3: Grab Wrecking Ball, Hatchet Master. Start Axe/Two-Hand Masteries.

tasks: TIP: Search for and defeat the 3 Exiles beside the waypoint for extra items.
Bandits: HELP ALIRA (15% All Res & Mana Regen)
Ensure Sunder links are set.
act3_the_sarn_encampment.weapon_target: Double Axe / Gilded Axe (craft with Rare Rustic Sash for 50-64% IPD)

tasks: BUY: 'Vulnerability' (Remove Poacher's Mark), 'Haste'
REWARD: Free 'Pride' (Swap to Pride on Bosses, Haste while travelling)
CRITICAL: After opening Undying Blockage, grab the Physical Damage Craft in the passage to Ebony Barracks!
CRITICAL: Grab the Physical Damage Craft in the passage to Ebony Barracks!

act3_the_ebony_barracks.tree_milestone: ACT 4: Finish Two Hand Mastery, and Axe Mastery.

tasks: CRAFT: A Gilded Axe if necessary (use Vendor Recipe: Weapon + Magic Rustic Sash + Whetstone = %IPD)
CHECK LINKS: Sunder - Melee Phys - Close Combat (or Ruthless)
TIP: Get to Level 32 before entering Kaom's Stronghold to avoid XP penalties.

act4_the_dried_lake.weapon_target: Shadow Axe / Dagger Axe / Timber Axe / Headsman Axe

act4_kaom_s_dream.tree_milestone: ACT 5: Push toward Ranger. Grab Acuity, Weathered Hunter. RUSH PRECISE TECHNIQUE (Acc > Life!).

tasks: REWARD: Free 'Fist of War' from Dialla (Add to Sunder 4-Link!)
REWARD: Free Golem of your choosing from Oyun
BUY: 'Cast when Damage Taken' (1 Alchemy) for Immortal Call later.
REWARD (Key to Freedom): Free Granite Flask from Lani
REWARD (Death to Purity): Free Rare Viridian Jewel (Look for % Phys Attack Damage Leeched as Mana!)
TIP: This zone has many guaranteed Magic Monster packs — farm them for extra XP!
CRITICAL: Click the Lever above the Sign to access the next Physical Damage Craft!
TIP: Place a portal outside the Cathedral Rooftop entrance before entering!
LILLY ROTH: Clear Twilight Strand so she sells all gems.
BUY: 'Urgent Orders', 'Lifetap', 'Immortal Call'
LINK: CWDT - Immortal Call
LINK: Frostblink - Intimidating Cry - Urgent Orders - Lifetap
FULL SETUP: Sunder - Melee Phys - Close Combat - Ruthless
AURAS: Blood and Sand, War Banner, Herald of Ash, Blood Rage
SWAP AURA: Haste/Determination (travel) | Pride + Vulnerability (bosses)
PANTHEON: Set to Brine King (Major) & Ryslatha (Minor)

act6_the_twilight_strand.weapon_target: Labrys / Noble Axe / Abyssal Axe / Karui Chopper

act6_shavronne_s_tower.tree_milestone: ACT 6-7: Grab Expert Hunter, Herbalism, Thick Skin for Life/Defense.

tasks: TIP: Place a Safety Portal — the fuel pylon enemies can be very dangerous!
REWARD (Silver Locket): Grab another Granite Flask if needed.

act7_the_chamber_of_sins_level_2.tree_milestone: ACT 8+: Finish Intuition, Cloth and Chain. Grab Accuracy/Mark Masteries.

tasks: TIP: Place a portal near the Dread Thicket entrance if you see it.
TIP: Ctrl+Click the entrance to reset the zone for more XP on your way out.

act9_the_descent.weapon_target: Sundering Axe / Ezomyte Axe / Vaal Axe / Despot Axe

tasks: CRITICAL: Acquire the highest tier Physical Damage craft near the Waypoint.
TIP: Consider rolling a Bleed Removal Flask for this zone.
REWARD (Safe Passage): Choose Silver Flask or Quartz Flask.
REWARD (Death and Rebirth): Choose Rare Gladiator Plate or General's Brigandine.
TIP: Place a portal near the entrance, WP to town, then take portal south to find The Control Blocks.
